testcase.name: test_01_get_all_certified_clients

error.message:
failed on setup with "AssertionError: Login failed: 404 page not found
assert 404 == 200 + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code"

testcase.error: backend/tests/test_certified_clients.py:26: in setup_auth assert response.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: 404 page not found E E assert 404 == 200 E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
